name: 07_js_index_imports_merge
description: Competing top-of-file imports: logger vs customAuth (scenario 6)
goose_prompt_control: There is a merge conflict in index.js. Keep both upstream logger and fork customAuth.verify in run(). Do not leave conflict markers.
goose_prompt_experiment: There is a merge conflict in index.js. Merge imports and run() so logging and enterprise auth both run. Do not leave conflict markers.
